scripts.test:e2e:prepare: pnpm generate:slides -- --topic "HTML Slides Editor Project Overview" --summary "A generated project deck that doubles as a broad regression fixture for the HTML Slides Editor." --points "Problem framing|Architecture|Feature matrix|Charts|Images|Roadmap|Comparison|Coverage"
scripts.test:e2e:serve: pnpm test:e2e:prepare && pnpm build && pnpm --filter web exec vite preview --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173 --strictPort
